mainEntity.name: How long does trademark registration take in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 12-18 months from filing to registration, subject to examination and opposition. However, you get TM™ status immediately upon filing, which provides interim protection. Expedited examination is available for an additional government fee.

Brand names, logos, taglines, product names, colour combinations, sound marks, and shape marks. The mark must be distinctive and not descriptive of the goods/services. We assess distinctiveness and recommend modifications if needed.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of trademark registration in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Government fee is Rs 4,500 for individuals/startups and Rs 9,000 for others (per class). Our professional fee covers search, filing, examination follow-up, and objection reply. Contact +91-95139 39333 for a complete quote.
